en.name_en: Worship hall, main hall, and auxiliary shrine of Kasuga Shrine
en.description_en: The worship hall, main hall, and auxiliary shrine classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Kawamata Town. It is located at Aza Miyamae 37, Kawamata-machi, Date District, Fukushima Prefecture.
